title: Music Toast
description: Let me know which music track is it!
body: [![Profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=teal)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) --- ## 📗 DESCRIPTION Shows you a toast or notification with the details of the music track that just started playing in Minecraft, such as the song title and artist, enhancing the in-game music experience with quick, informative pop-ups. ---
